urdu transliteration text: HAI JAAN AAB LABON PAR,BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: I am breathing my last, please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text: BABA NAZAR KO PHAIRLO DAM TOOTNEY LAGA,
english translation text: O Father, please look away from here as I breathe my last…

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI KAY PHAL SEY KHOON HAI DIL KA RUKAHOWA,
english translation text: The blood from my heart is blocked by the spear

urdu transliteration text: UBLEYGA KHOON ZAMEEN PAR,
english translation text: A fountain of blood will spill to the ground…

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text: MAINAY TUMHAIN BULAYA THA TAKEY MAIN KEHSAKON,
english translation text: The only reason I called you here is so that I could tell you…

urdu transliteration text: BILKUL NA GHAM KARO MEREY DIL KO HAI AB SUKOON,
english translation text: Do no grieve, for my heart is at peace

urdu transliteration text: BETHEY RAHO YAHAN MAGAR,
english translation text: Do sit with me here, but…

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text: AMMA KO YE KHABAR NAHO MERE SINA LAGI
english translation text: Do not inform mother that I was pierced by a spear

urdu transliteration text: GASH AAGAYA HAI BAS ZARA SHIDDAT THI PYAAS KI
english translation text: Tell her that I just fainted due to extreme thirst

urdu transliteration text: ME AARAHAHU JAAO GHAR
english translation text: Go home, for I am coming but…

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text: BOLE HUSSEIN BAAP KO BEHLA RAHE HE AAP
english translation text: Hussain (A.S) said “I know you are trying to soothe your father…

urdu transliteration text: MALUM HAI KE YAHAAN SE KAHAAN JAARAHE HE AAP
english translation text: For I know very well where you are going from here

urdu transliteration text: KEHTE HO MUU KO PHER KAR
english translation text: Why do you turn your face away from me when you say…?

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text: SANSAIN UKHAR RAHI HAIN TO MADHAM HAI NABZ BHI,
english translation text: You are breathing your last and your pulse is about to stop

urdu transliteration text: KARTEY HO AAH HAM KO HAI TAKEED SABAR KI,
english translation text: While you sigh, I am trying to be patient

urdu transliteration text: KEHTEY HO THAM KE JIGAR,
english translation text: You say this while placing your hand on your chest…

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text:
AKBAR PUKARE BAAP SE DILKO SAMBHALIE
Akbar requested his father to hold his heart
TUTI SINA KALEJE ME REHNE HI DIJIYE
english translation text: “Leave the spear in my chest, for if you don’t…

urdu transliteration text: NIKLEGA SAATH ME JIGAR
english translation text: My heart will come out with it”

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text:
MOLA NEY YA ALI KAHA DIL KO SAMBHAL KAR,
Mola (A.S) gathered courage and cried out “Ya Ali”
PHIR KHUD HI LARKHARAGAYE BARCHI NIKAL KAR,
english translation text: Then he got nervous after removing the spear

urdu transliteration text:
KEHTA RAHA JAWAN PISAR,
While his young son kept saying…
BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”

urdu transliteration text: REHAN SAATH BARCHI KEY DIL BHI NIKALPARA,
english translation text: His heart came out along with the spear

urdu transliteration text:
KARTEY RAHEY HUSSAIN A.S BHI TADAIR MARSIA,
Hussain (A.S) kept lamenting uncontrollably
MAA KEHTI AAI NANGEYSAR,
english translation text: The mother ran from the tents saying…

urdu transliteration text: BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)

urdu transliteration text: BOLEY PADAR SEY AKBAR BARCHI NA KHAINCHNA,
english translation text: Akbar requested his father, “Please do not pull out the spear (from my chest)”
